description: Machine-readable CDE definitions for PanKbase single-cell RNA-seq sample-level experiment and QC metadata. Covers library / platform metadata, alignment QC, cell-calling QC (CellBender), and mitochondrial QC aggregated as per-sample means. Donor-level fields are NOT duplicated here; use donor_rrid_ref to join to the PanKbase donor CDE collection.

cdes.question_text: What is the unique identifier for this single-cell RNA-seq sample?
cdes.notes: Free-text string. Conventionally formatted as '<donor_id>__<treatment_label>' in PanKbase-contributed datasets but not enforced. Uniqueness is required within a study; global uniqueness is recommended.

cdes.question_text: What is the RRID of the donor from whom this sample was derived?

cross_reference.description: Links this scRNA-seq sample to the donor record defined in the PanKbase Donor Metadata CDE collection. Value domain (RRID pattern) and semantics are governed by PKB_D_001.

cdes.notes: Accepts either a canonical 'RRID:SAMN########' value, a bare BioSample accession ('SAMN########'), or a consortium-native donor ID (e.g., 'HPAP-019', 'HP-21070-01') when no RRID has been assigned. Downstream tooling should resolve non-RRID values to an RRID by joining to the donor CDE table.

cdes.question_text: What is the study or dataset accession that this sample belongs to?
cdes.notes: Accepts GEO (GSE########), ArrayExpress (E-MTAB-####), BioProject (PRJNA######), PanKbase consortium tags (e.g., 'HPAP'), or an internal study identifier.

cdes.question_text: Which library chemistry version was used to construct this single-cell RNA-seq library?
cdes.notes: Refers to the 10x Genomics single-cell chemistry version when using Chromium; 'Other' is used for alternative protocols (e.g., Smart-seq2, Drop-seq).

cdes.question_text: Which library preparation kit was used for this sample?
cdes.notes: Free text, e.g., '10x Genomics Chromium Single Cell 3' v3'. INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element that downstream contributors should populate when known.

cdes.question_text: Which sequencing platform was used to sequence this library?
cdes.notes: Free text, e.g., 'Illumina NovaSeq 6000', 'Illumina HiSeq 4000'. INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element.

cdes.question_text: Which tool was used to align and count reads for this sample?
cdes.notes: INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element.

cdes.question_text: Which reference genome build was used for alignment?
cdes.notes: Free text, e.g., 'GRCh38', 'GRCh38-2020-A', 'refdata-gex-GRCh38-2020-A'. INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element.

cdes.question_text: If CellRanger was used, which version?
cdes.notes: Free text version string, e.g., '7.1.0'. INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element.

cdes.question_text: How many cells passed QC and are included in this sample's expression matrix?
cdes.notes: Post-QC cell count per sample (after doublet removal / ambient RNA correction, if performed). INFERRED FIELD: not present in the source RDS metadata for metadata_for_DEG.rds; added as a commonly-expected scRNA-seq metadata element.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean UMI (nCount_RNA) count per cell for this sample?
cdes.notes: Mean total UMI counts per cell, computed over cells passing QC. Corresponds to the 'nCount_RNA' column in a Seurat object.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean number of detected genes (nFeature_RNA) per cell for this sample?
cdes.notes: Mean number of genes with >0 counts per cell. Corresponds to 'nFeature_RNA' in a Seurat object.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean number of total sequencing reads per cell for this sample?
What is the mean number of uniquely mapped reads per cell for this sample?
What is the mean number of secondary alignments per cell?
cdes.notes: Reads that mapped to multiple locations in the reference (SAM flag 0x100).

cdes.question_text: What is the mean number of supplementary (chimeric) alignments per cell?
cdes.notes: Typically 0 for standard scRNA-seq pipelines (SAM flag 0x800). Retained for forward compatibility with datasets that report it.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean CellBender cell-probability score across cells in this sample?
cdes.notes: Output of CellBender's remove-background workflow: posterior probability that a barcode represents a real cell rather than empty droplet / ambient RNA. Typical QC-passing samples have mean values very close to 1.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean post-CellBender UMI count per cell?
cdes.notes: Mean UMIs per cell after CellBender removes ambient RNA contamination; should be less than or equal to mean_umi_count_per_cell.

cdes.question_text: What percentage of UMIs was removed on average per cell by CellBender?
cdes.notes: Mean percentage of UMIs per cell attributed to ambient RNA and removed by CellBender.

cdes.question_text: What is the mean percentage of reads mapping to mitochondrial genes per cell?
cdes.notes: High values (>20%) typically indicate stressed or dying cells and are commonly used as a per-cell QC filter.

version_history.changes: Initial draft. 20 CDEs derived from metadata_for_DEG.rds (13 observed columns) plus 1 cross-reference to the donor CDE collection and 6 inferred fields commonly expected in scRNA-seq metadata (library_prep_kit, sequencing_platform, alignment_tool, reference_genome, cellranger_version, n_cells). Inferred fields are documented as such in their 'notes' field and marked as 'Desired' tier. Expected to evolve after collaborator review; fields may be added, removed, or re-tiered.
